name: Bran Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift together flour, salt, baking soda, and cinnamon.
2. Add bran to the sifted dry ingredients.
3. Cream butter and sugar until well combined.
4. Add eggs to the butter mixture and beat thoroughly.
5. Alternately add the sifted dry ingredients and sour milk to the creamed mixture.
6. Stir in raisins until evenly distributed.
7. Drop spoonfuls of batter onto a greased baking sheet.
8. Bake in a moderate oven (400°F) for about 20 minutes.
20 servings.
